Notes: SUNYAC Championship Game. Cortland wins its seventh SUNYAC title.
All-Tournament Team: Erika Puffer (Oneonta), Brittany Finkle (Geneseo),
Alexandra McCullough (New Paltz), Kristen Caban (New Paltz),
Game.Officials: Gary Meyers,  John Proper,  Carlo Lorenzetti
